themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Focuses on AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, often in a multi-agent system or with advanced capabilities like planning and execution.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Covers AI tools designed to help developers write, debug, review, and understand code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Encompasses a wide range of AI-powered applications designed to assist in various research activities, from literature reviews to data analysis.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Highlights how AI is being used to streamline product management workflows, identify issues, and improve strategic decision-making.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Covers AI tools and techniques for condensing large amounts of text, such as meeting transcripts or research papers, into concise summaries.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Discusses the creation and use of AI-generated personas or simulated users for testing or research purposes.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Examines the effects of AI on job markets, including job displacement, creation, and the changing nature of work.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Focuses on using AI to analyze user sentiment from feedback, reviews, or social media to understand opinions and emotions.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Explores the application of AI in automating or enhancing usability testing processes and analysis.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Covers AI applications directly supporting the design process and user research methodologies.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
